final_choice.row_label: Research and development costs are capitalized

variables.notes: R:c. No explicit SG&A subtotal exists. Selected the main overhead buckets 'External expenses' and 'Staff costs'. Added 'Research and development costs are capitalized' because it is the only clear R&D-related income-statement row above EBIT and may need to be included in XSGA so that XSGA - XRD removes it. Manual review needed because this row is a capitalization adjustment (negative expense), not a conventional R&D expense line, and its inclusion in overhead is judgmental.
